creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Steve Peurifoy from comment #0)

> … I think it's really a kernel issue. …

From your poudriere build log: 

pkg-static: Fail to chown /html/core/arch/x86_64/fn._mm256_set_m128.html:Bad file descriptor

From <https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/923#issue-1007242724>: 

> … yada yada package bad file descriptor. …

<https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/923#issuecomment-928244668>: 

> This looks like a problem with pkg not Poudriere.
